disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: The cruise ship at center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak has to undergo extra cleaning
updates.summary_zh: 爆发汉坦病毒的邮轮需额外清洁。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus: Climate change suspected of contributing to recent surge in cases in Argentina - Le Monde.fr
updates.body_en: Hantavirus: Climate change suspected of contributing to recent surge in cases in Argentina Le Monde.fr
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷汉坦病毒病例激增，气候变化被怀疑是原因。

updates.title_en: Americans sick with Ebola will go to Europe for treatment instead of US
updates.summary_zh: 美国埃博拉患者将赴欧洲治疗而非美国。

updates.title_en: Inside the Nebraska quarantine facility responding to hantavirus
updates.summary_zh: 内布拉斯加州隔离设施应对汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Exposed Hantavirus Patients Could Go Home—If They Agree To 24/7 Surveillance (Latest Updates) - Forbes
updates.body_en: Exposed Hantavirus Patients Could Go Home—If They Agree To 24/7 Surveillance (Latest Updates) Forbes
updates.summary_zh: 暴露汉坦病毒患者可回家但需全天监控。

updates.title_en: ‘Outbreaks of this nature must be addressed quickly and effectively’: University of Nebraska chief on hantavirus scare - theweek.in
updates.body_en: ‘Outbreaks of this nature must be addressed quickly and effectively’: University of Nebraska chief on hantavirus scare theweek.in
updates.summary_zh: 内布拉斯加大学校长强调快速应对汉坦病毒爆发。

updates.title_en: EU receives experimental Hantavirus treatment from Japan - Yeni Safak English
updates.body_en: EU receives experimental Hantavirus treatment from Japan Yeni Safak English
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟从日本接收实验性汉坦病毒治疗。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus - exposed cruise passengers may return home soon
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮接触汉坦病毒乘客或可返家。

updates.title_en: WHO DON Update: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship travel, Multi-locations - Avian Flu Diary
updates.body_en: WHO DON Update: Hantavirus outbreak linked to cruise ship travel, Multi-locations Avian Flu Diary
updates.summary_zh: WHO 通报邮轮汉坦病毒疫情涉及多地。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus - exposed cruise passengers may soon be allowed to return home but must remain under 24 / 7 watch
updates.summary_zh: 邮轮接触汉坦病毒乘客或可返家但需全天监测。
